name: Rhubarb Something Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Put rhubarb in a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2. Mix sugar and Jello according to package instructions.
3. Sprinkle the mixture over the rhubarb.
4. Sprinkle cake mix evenly over the top of the Jello layer.
5. Sprinkle water evenly over all ingredients.
6. Slice butter on top of the cake mix.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
8. Serve with warm vanilla ice cream or whipped cream, if available. Serve cold if there is any left.
